update order_header
order_header_code = #{orderHeaderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_num = #{productNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
product_price = #{productPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
freight_price = #{freightPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
coupon_price = #{couponPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
activity_price = #{activityPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discount_price = #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pay_price = #{payPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update order_header set order_header_code = #{orderHeaderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_num = #{productNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, product_price = #{productPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, freight_price = #{freightPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, coupon_price = #{couponPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, activity_price = #{activityPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, discount_price = #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pay_price = #{payPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
